title: aristida simpliciflora
intro: Aristida simpliciflora, also known as the one-flowered three-awn grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aristida simpliciflora include the ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs, and alleviate respiratory issues. It is often prepared as an infusion or tea, as well as a powder or capsule, for its herbal remedies.
